query_normalized: statistical analysis of sentiment drift in social media during economic recessions statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the same dependent variable (sentiment/narrative drift on social media over time) on the same domain (social media platforms), even though it studies a different societal event (Wagner mutiny vs. economic recessions). For a literature review, this provides relevant methodological precedent for analyzing sentiment drift in social media during major societal events, which is the core measurement approach the user's question requires.
